FGO-WINTER_EVENT.title: Crystallization of Winter
FGO-WINTER_EVENT.description_0:
The masterpiece of a certain alchemist family, born in the castle of eternal winter. 
 The useless magic circuit engraved on her whole body is the proud girl's reason for being, and also―――the proof of her bond with a great "Hero".
FGO-WINTER_EVENT.description_1: You have a desire to take her away and take action for it.
FGO-WINTER_EVENT.description_2: You walked past her and didn't want to get in touch with her.
FGO-WINTER_EVENT.option_0: [Take Her Away] Get a Crystallization of Winter.
FGO-F_G_O_LIBRARY.title: The Library (FGO)

It's someone's footprint. 
 Or scar. 
 If it comes to posterity, i was bitten by a fish and injured. 
 Some people die at last. 
 It is a mountain of treasure. 
 It is a tomb of paper once in a person. 
 Even so, ah. 
 "I don't want to be forgotten. " 
 Why can't they be loved?
[Read] Choose 1 of ? cards to add to your deck. Lose  %d Max HP.
FGO-F_G_O_LIBRARY.pages.READ.description:
I won't get tired of reading the stories of the heroes a few times. 

You noticed them staring at you, 
 you quickly left.
FGO-F_G_O_LIBRARY.pages.SLEEP.descriptio:
Reading is for chumps. 
 You doze off in a comfy chair instead. 
 Zzz... zzz... ..Zz.... 
 You wake up feeling refreshed.

FGO-MANOF_CHALDEA.title: Man of Chaldea
FGO-MANOF_CHALDEA.pages.INITIAL.descript:
As humanity is the continuous footprint (memories) from the past to the future, a person grows by accumulating experience, knowledge, and stories. 

The trivial conversation in an hour. 
 The difficult to acquire friendship in a day. 
 The promising growth in a year. No humans can remember those things in details. 
 The only thing that remains is the result, and the progress is always forgotten. 
 In the long run, or rather objectively, the boy is no different to other humans.
FGO-MANOF_CHALDEA.pages.PAGE0.descriptio:
At the end of the day, his memories are renewed. 
 They turn into a blank state. 
 Among those memories, he only retains the essential ones. 23 hours and 55 minutes are lost. All the dazzlingly beautiful experiences that occurred in a day are bleached. 5 minutes of belief. 
 His will to fight against the renewal allows him to keep the memories that he must not lose/that he must not forget.
FGO-MANOF_CHALDEA.pages.PAGE1.descriptio:
And so, the boy became an adult. 
 By collecting only the necessary information to a human being (himself), he has successfully become "The shape of a certain someone". He does not think of that as real or fake. 
 Things like wishes, beliefs, and vows are simple. 

"Humans are beings that do good things". 

It is the one and only Grand Order that makes him human.
FGO-BEYONDTHE.title: Beyond the Night Without the Snow Flower
FGO-BEYONDTHE.pages.INITIAL.description:
Every path I took led me to a darkness as dead as night. 
 My talents as a mage were average, my family lineage ordinary, and my opportunity to capitalize on my aptitude as a Master fell into the void from within a coffin. All that remains is regret, the thought that I could have made something out of myself. 

Yet in that world, there was light even at night. It wasn't as strong as the sun, but not as gentle as the moon. It was a ghostly light, placid like snow falling at night.
FGO-BEYONDTHE.pages.PHASE_1.description:
I have to live. 
 I need to put myself together, refuse to falter any further, and take a stand as many times as is necessary. I must keep moving forward, even if countless regrets drag me down. 

For the girl who disappeared like a snowy blossom, for she who came from a world that no longer exists... 
 I am her one and only Master. 
 Kadoc Zemlupus.
FGO-BEYONDTHE.pages.LEAVE.description: You continue walking towards the top of the tower.
FGO-DEVIL_SLOT.title: Devil Slot
FGO-DEVIL_SLOT.pages.INITIAL.description: This is the worst-case scenario, you have no other choice.
FGO-DEVIL_SLOT.pages.INITIAL.options.REM: [Outrun] Remove a card from your deck.
FGO-DEVIL_SLOT.pages.BB.description: You don't want the gift anymore.
